candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current assets component, but not the total current assets.
Subset of current assets, not total current assets.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

candidates.row_label: Sale of non-current assets held for sale
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not a balance sheet stock of current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet cash measure available; values align with cash flow ending balance.
Cash flow subtotal, not cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash of subsidiaries due to group changes
candidates.why: Specific cash flow adjustment, not ending cash balance.
Cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Cash outflow item, not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: No separate 'Cash and cash equivalents' label appears; 'Cash Equivalents' is the reported balance-sheet cash line and matches ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket; non-current rather than current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Change in current liabilities with credit institutions
candidates.why: Cash flow change item, not period-end current liabilities total.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of long-term liabilities to credit institutions
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term bank debt; core component of short-term debt.
Short-term borrowings/current bank liabilities; financing-related current debt.
Debt maturity disclosure for within 1 year; appears to duplicate the current portion of long-term liabilities to credit institutions in overlapping periods, so should not be combined with that line.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of long-term liabilities to credit institutions

variables.notes: Selected the minimal non-lease debt components representing current borrowings. Excluded 'Next year lease instalments' per lease exclusion rule. Did not include 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid double counting with the explicitly named current portion line.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Non-current/deferred tax balance, not taxes payable.
Appears under other current assets, so not a tax liability.
Cash flow tax payment line, not taxes payable balance.

variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist; confident this is the current tax payable line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total/net property, plant and equipment.
Tangible fixed asset component, but not total PPE and includes lease-related assets separately.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, less preferable than the reported total.

variables.notes: Preferred reported total net PPE over balancing value and components.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Only a current asset component, not total assets.
Direct operating cash flow subtotal; best match for net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Preferred final operating cash flow subtotal over the pre-working-capital line.
